name: The Final Ward
description: The air itself resists you as you approach the Grail's resting place. A lattice of golden light coalesces into a seraph of living flame, its wings filling the vaulted chamber. It does not speak — it simply raises a hand, and the world narrows to a single, searing test of will and steel.
failureConsequence: The seraph's radiance overwhelms you, and you are borne gently but irresistibly back through the temple halls. You awake outside, unharmed but deeply shaken, the Grail still beyond your grasp.
